channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [SWADEIN] Swadeshi Industries & Leasing Ltd Converts 1,23,10,000 Convertible Warrants into Equity Shares
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Swadeshi Industries & Leasing Ltd announced the conversion of 1,23,10,000 Convertible Warrants into 1,23,10,000 Equity Shares. The conversion was carried out at a rate of 1:1, with each warrant being converted into one equity share of face value Rs. 10/-. The equity shares have been allotted to the Promoters and Non-Promoters of the Company. The decision was made at the Board of Directors meeting held on March 05, 2026.

  • Swadeshi Industries & Leasing Ltd converts 1,23,10,000 Convertible Warrants into Equity Shares.
  • The conversion was carried out at a rate of 1:1, with each warrant being converted into one equity share of face value Rs. 10/-.
  • The equity shares have been allotted to the Promoters and Non-Promoters of the Company.
  • The decision was made at the Board of Directors meeting held on March 05, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SWADESHI INDUSTRIES LEASING CO.LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [NACDAC] NACDAC Infrastructure Secures Rs. 15 Crore Contract from Northern Railway
item.description:
🔥 Trending

NACDAC Infrastructure Limited, a leading construction and infrastructure development company, has been awarded a contract worth Rs. 15,15,80,987.60 for the execution of railway infrastructure works by Northern Railway - Ferozpur Division. The project involves the augmentation of homing capacity at ELS/LDH from 200 to 300 locomotives and is aimed at enhancing operational efficiency and capacity expansion within the Northern Railway network. This contract further strengthens NACDAC Infrastructure Limited’s presence in the railway infrastructure sector and expands its portfolio of infrastructure development projects across India.

  • NACDAC Infrastructure Limited has received a Letter of Acceptance (LOA) from Northern Railway - Ferozpur Division for the execution of railway infrastructure works.
  • The contract involves the augmentation of homing capacity at ELS/LDH from 200 to 300 locomotives.
  • The contract value is Rs. 15,15,80,987.60 (Rupees Fifteen Crore Fifteen Lakh Eighty Thousand Nine Hundred Eighty-Seven and Sixty Paise Only).
  • The project completion period is 12 months from the date of Letter of Acceptance.
  • This contract strengthens NACDAC Infrastructure Limited’s presence in the railway infrastructure sector and expands its portfolio of infrastructure development projects across India.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NACDAC Infrastructure Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [LCCINFOTEC] LCC Infotech Ltd: Appointment of Ms. Deepshikha Khandelwal as Company Secretary cum Compliance Officer, Resignation of Mr. Vineet Jain
item.description:
LCC Infotech Ltd has announced the appointment of Ms. Deepshikha Khandelwal as the new Company Secretary cum Compliance Officer and the resignation of Mr. Vineet Jain from the same position. The changes will be effective from 05.03.2026. Ms. Khandelwal is a qualified Company Secretary with over 5 years of experience in compliances and corporate law. Mr. Jain has resigned due to personal reasons.

  • LCC Infotech Ltd has appointed Ms. Deepshikha Khandelwal as the new Company Secretary cum Compliance Officer.
  • Ms. Khandelwal is a qualified Company Secretary with over 5 years of experience.
  • Mr. Vineet Jain has resigned from the post of Company Secretary cum Compliance Officer.
  • Mr. Jain's resignation is due to personal reasons.
  • The changes will be effective from 05.03.2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: LCC INFOTECH LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [HAZOOR] Hazoor Multi Projects Ltd Appoints Pradeep Kumar as Additional Independent Director
item.description:
Hazoor Multi Projects Ltd has appointed Mr. Pradeep Kumar as an Additional Director to be designated as Independent Director. The appointment is effective from 5th March, 2026 and will last until the date of the ensuing General Meeting of the Company. If approved by the members, Mr. Kumar will serve for a consecutive period of 5 years till 4th March, 2031. Mr. Kumar is a qualified Company Secretary with over 10 years of experience in the secretarial and legal field, possessing a strong understanding of corporate governance, legal compliance, and financial regulations. He has been appointed in accordance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI Listing Regulations and Schedule Il of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.

  • Appointment of Mr. Pradeep Kumar as Additional Independent Director
  • Effective from 5th March, 2026
  • To serve till 4th March, 2031, subject to member approval
  • Mr. Kumar is a qualified Company Secretary with over 10 years of experience
  • Appointment in accordance with SEBI Listing Regulations and Schedule Il of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HAZOOR MULTI PROJECTS LTD.-$ | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SWADEIN] Swadeshi Industries & Leasing Ltd Converts 1,23,10,000 Convertible Warrants into Equity Shares
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Swadeshi Industries & Leasing Ltd has announced the conversion of 1,23,10,000 Convertible Warrants into 1,23,10,000 Equity Shares. The conversion was approved by the Board of Directors in accordance with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Issue of Capital and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2018 and the Companies Act, 2013. The equity shares have been allotted to the Promoters and Non-Promoters of the Company. The conversion price is Rs. 10/- per equity share.

  • Swadeshi Industries & Leasing Ltd converts 1,23,10,000 Convertible Warrants into Equity Shares.
  • The conversion was approved by the Board of Directors.
  • The conversion is in accordance with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Issue of Capital and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2018 and the Companies Act, 2013.
  • The equity shares have been allotted to the Promoters and Non-Promoters of the Company.
  • The conversion price is Rs. 10/- per equity share.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SWADESHI INDUSTRIES LEASING CO.LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [LCCINFOTEC] LCC Infotech Ltd: Appointment of Ms. Deepshikha Khandelwal as Company Secretary cum Compliance Officer and Resignation of Mr. Vineet Jain
item.description:
LCC Infotech Ltd held a Board Meeting on 05.03.2026, where they appointed Ms. Deepshikha Khandelwal as the Company Secretary cum Compliance Officer and accepted the resignation of Mr. Vineet Jain from the same position. Ms. Khandelwal is a Qualified Company Secretary with over 5 years of experience in compliances and corporate law. Mr. Jain resigned due to personal reasons. The company also announced the shifting of the keeping of the Book of Account from Primarc Tower in West Bengal to Office No. 701, Silicon Tower in Ahmedabad, Gujarat.

  • Appointment of Ms. Deepshikha Khandelwal as Company Secretary cum Compliance Officer
  • Resignation of Mr. Vineet Jain from the post of Company Secretary cum Compliance Officer
  • Ms. Khandelwal is a Qualified Company Secretary with over 5 years of experience
  • Mr. Jain resigned due to personal reasons
  • Shifting of the keeping of the Book of Account from Primarc Tower in West Bengal to Office No. 701, Silicon Tower in Ahmedabad, Gujarat

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: LCC INFOTECH LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [BALMLAWRIE] Balmer Lawrie & Company Ltd Declares Interim Dividend of Rs.4.25 per Share for FY 2025-26
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Balmer Lawrie & Company Ltd announced the outcome of its Board Meeting held on 5th March, 2026. The Board declared an interim dividend of Rs.4.25 per equity share for the Financial Year 2025-26. The record date to determine the eligibility of shareholders to receive the dividend is fixed as 11th March, 2026. The Board also considered and took on record the fines imposed by BSE Limited and National Stock Exchange of India Limited for the quarter ended on 31st December, 2025 due to non-compliance with certain regulations, which were beyond the control of the company.

  • Balmer Lawrie & Company Ltd declares an interim dividend of Rs.4.25 per equity share for FY 2025-26.
  • The record date to determine the eligibility of shareholders for the dividend is 11th March, 2026.
  • The company considered and took on record the fines imposed by BSE Limited and NSE Limited for the quarter ended on 31st December, 2025.
  • The non-compliance was due to factors beyond the control of the company.
  • The company has made representations before the Stock Exchanges for waiver of such fines.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BALMER LAWRIE & CO.LTD. | Category: Dividend

item.title: [OROSMITHS] B K Narula HUF Acquires 0.05% Stake in Orosil Smiths India Limited
item.description:
B K Narula HUF, a HUF belonging to B. K. Narula, has acquired 23,915 equity shares of Orosil Smiths India Limited, representing 0.05% of the total paid-up equity share capital. The acquisition took place between 04.03.2026 and 05.03.2026 through the open market. The total paid-up equity share capital of the company stands at Rs. 4,13,16,000 before the acquisition and Rs. 4,13,16,000 after the acquisition.

  • B K Narula HUF acquires 0.05% stake in Orosil Smiths India Limited
  • Acquisition of 23,915 equity shares through open market
  • Total paid-up equity share capital of the company is Rs. 4,13,16,000
  • Acquirer belongs to non-promoter group
  • Acquisition increases the diluted share capital from 14.07% to 14.12%

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: OROSIL SMITHS INDIA LTD.-$ | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [MAPMYINDIA] Tata Mutual Fund Acquires 4.9761% Stake in C.E. Info Systems Ltd
item.description:
The Exchange has received a disclosure under Regulation 29(1) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 from Tata Mutual Fund. The fund has acquired 27,23,000 shares carrying voting rights in C.E. Info Systems Ltd, which amounts to 4.9761% of the company's total voting rights. This acquisition also includes 1,00,000 warrants/convertible securities. The mode of acquisition was secondary market purchase.

  • Tata Mutual Fund has acquired 4.9761% stake in C.E. Info Systems Ltd
  • The acquisition includes 27,23,000 shares and 1,00,000 warrants/convertible securities
  • The mode of acquisition was secondary market purchase
  • The acquisition does not lead to any changes in the company's total share capital or total voting capital

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: C.E. Info Systems Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [NOVIS] Nova Iron & Steel Delays Quarterly Results Submission Due to Accounting Adjustments
item.description:
Nova Iron & Steel Ltd. has delayed the submission of its unaudited financial results for the quarter ended 30th September 2025 and the quarter ended 31st December 2025 due to certain issues that arose earlier. The company needed additional time to complete financial adjustments, accounting entries, and bookkeeping in consultation with statutory auditors before finalizing the results. The company regrets the delay and assures timely compliance with regulatory requirements in the future.

  • Nova Iron & Steel delayed submission of unaudited financial results for two quarters
  • Delays caused by internal issues and additional time required for financial adjustments
  • Company consulted statutory auditors before finalizing results
  • Nova Iron & Steel committed to timely regulatory compliance in the future
  • Previous delays and reasons explained to the Exchange

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NOVA IRON & STEEL LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result
